question_sentence: Which Trump administration official filed a $250 million defamation suit against The Atlantic magazine?
Which tech boss announced this week he will step down as CEO of the company he’s led since 2011?
Gibraltar’s monkeys are consuming what unusual substance to counter tourist junk food?
A lost trove of letters written by which Romantic poet has been returned to its rightful owner?
How much will the US government begin paying to businesses this week as refunds for illegal tariffs?
What is the name of the annual spring meteor shower that peaked this week?
Which European country elected a pro-Russia former fighter pilot as its new prime minister?
The UK government announced a new smoking ban for people born after which year?
Which singer was tossed their bank card into the Trevi Fountain in Rome, only to fish it back out later?
Which country launched a mass trial for hundreds of alleged MS-13 gang members?
